design_philosophy: Editorial Tech Hybrid. A distinctive, memorable design that avoids generic AI-slop 'purple gradient SaaS' look. Combines the authority and clarity of Swiss design with deep, trustworthy Aegean blues. High-contrast, clean typography, and a modern B2B feel.

typography.rationale: Both Archivo and IBM Plex Sans offer excellent Greek Cyrillic support required for the dual-language GR/EN site. Archivo provides a technical, authoritative geometry, while IBM Plex Sans ensures crisp legibility for complex IT services content.

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tighter text-[#0F172A] leading-tight
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]

spacing_and_layout.marketing_grid: Bento Grid Mode A (Tetris Grid) for Portfolio and Core Services features. Use wide gaps (gap-8, gap-12).
spacing_and_layout.surface_treatment: The 'Tracing Beam' concept for high-tier pricing cards and Grid Borders ('The Technical Look') for features sections. Strict 1px solid borders (border-[#E2E8F0]) with soft inner shadows rather than heavy drop-shadows.

components.strategy: Hybrid strategy. Marketing/Layout sections built with pure HTML/Tailwind for creative asymmetry. Interactive forms, dropdowns, and accordions built with highly customized Shadcn UI.
components.navigation: Sticky navigation (z-50) using Glassmorphism (backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/80) with a subtle 1px bottom border. Must include language toggle (GR/EN) and a primary CTA 'Get a Quote'. Dropdowns for Services.
components.buttons: Square or slightly rounded (rounded-sm). Primary buttons use #0066FF. Secondary buttons use transparent background with #0F4C81 border. Always include hover states with subtle translation (-translate-y-0.5).
components.cards: Minimalist service cards with Lucide icons (in #0F4C81). 1px border, flat white background, subtle lift on hover.
components.forms: Shadcn Form, Input, and Textarea elements customized to have sharp corners and 1px #E2E8F0 borders. Focus state must ring with #0066FF.
components.accordion: FAQ built with Shadcn Accordion. Minimalist styling, border-b only.

motion_and_interactions.page_load: Staggered fade-in-up animations for hero content and bento grids using Framer Motion.
motion_and_interactions.hover_effects: Cards subtly elevate (-translate-y-1) and cast a 'shadow-lg'. Links show an underline expansion. Buttons darken in background color.

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA and WCAG AA compliance. Dark blue text on white/light grey backgrounds. Explicit focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#0066FF]) on all interactive elements.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='contact-submit-button', data-testid='lang-toggle-gr').

features: Live Chat Placeholder Button (Fixed bottom right)

hero_background.description: Abstract glowing lines and network data visualization. Use as an overlay or background for the hero section.

services_cybersecurity.description: Modern digital spheres interconnected by glowing lines, showcasing a futuristic network concept.

about_team.description: Four professionals in a modern office meeting space. Use in the About Us section.

contact_support.description: Woman on phone and laptop at cafe table. Use for Contact or Technical Support service card.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize React Router for multi-page navigation.
Set up Tailwind config with the specified colors and font families.
Install 'lucide-react' for icons, 'framer-motion' for animations, '@studio-freight/react-lenis' for smooth scrolling.
Implement the Layout component with the Sticky Glassmorphism Header and a heavy footer (py-24).
Ensure the Language Context/State is built to toggle text between English and Greek (use placeholder Greek text if actual copy isn't provided).

Build the 6 Service cards (Website design/development, Website updates/maintenance, Web hosting, Domain registration, Cybersecurity, IT consulting) on the Services page and as a grid on the Home page.
Create a pricing section with 3 tiers emphasizing Local Greek support and reliability.
Add the GDPR Cookie Consent Banner and Live Chat Placeholder floating button globally.
Include data-testid on every interactive element.
